log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Lich's turn ---
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:6+9=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Lich is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Lich WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:2+9=11 vs DC 16] FAIL — still paralyzed.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:3+9=12 vs DC 16] FAIL! 4 psychic damage. HP: 131/135
Lich is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Lich WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:19+9=28 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:15+9=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician.
→ Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician: CON save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 20] FAIL! 27 necrotic damage. HP: 40/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:12+9=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician: FAIL! 28 fire damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ROUND 6 ===
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician: SUCCESS. 15 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 6 rounds ===
